1. Build new version: https://github.com/mmozeiko/build-dawn
2. Include new header file (.h): https://github.com/webgpu-native/webgpu-headers
3. Generate C++ wrapper based on the new header (.hpp): https://github.com/eliemichel/WebGPU-Cpp
3.1. Also generate raii wrapper
4. maybe delete _NULLABLE keyword from generated webgpu.hpp
